default.card_title: Evaluate TOU Performance and Activate the Right Customers
default.card_body: See how Analytics Workbench helps utilities compare TOU adoption, quantify load-shift potential, and turn the right customer segments into ready-to-launch campaigns.

default.card_title: Run a VPP Program From Targeting to Delivered Capacity
default.card_body: See how Bidgely agents identify eligible smart thermostat customers, recruit them at speed, and verify whether committed capacity was actually delivered.

default.card_title: Target Weatherization Candidates and Launch Personalized Outreach
default.card_body: See how Bidgely combines appliance, premise, income, and load-curve signals to identify high-value weatherization candidates and move them directly into Campaign Builder.

default.card_title: Find High-Impact Cooling Customers With Analytics Workbench
default.card_body: See how appliance-level intelligence helps utilities isolate inefficient cooling loads, peak-hour usage, and high-consumption households for DSM, weatherization, and demand response programs.

default.section_intro: AI-powered targeting for flexible load, TOU, DSM, VPP, and weatherization programs.

videos.card_title: Evaluate TOU Performance and Activate the Right Customers
videos.card_body: See how Analytics Workbench helps utilities compare TOU adoption, quantify load-shift potential, and turn the right customer segments into ready-to-launch campaigns.

videos.card_title: Run a VPP Program From Targeting to Delivered Capacity
videos.card_body: See how Bidgely agents identify eligible smart thermostat customers, recruit them at speed, and verify whether committed capacity was actually delivered.

videos.card_title: Target Weatherization Candidates and Launch Personalized Outreach
videos.card_body: See how Bidgely combines appliance, premise, income, and load-curve signals to identify high-value weatherization candidates and move them directly into Campaign Builder.

videos.card_body: See how appliance-level intelligence helps utilities isolate inefficient cooling loads, peak-hour usage, and high-consumption households for DSM, weatherization, and demand response programs.

default.section_intro: Personalized, proactive experiences that help customers understand usage, resolve issues, and act with confidence.

videos.card_title: Answer Customer Energy Questions With an Agentic Energy Assistant
videos.card_body: See how Energy Assistant uses AMI, rate, appliance, and behavior data to explain high bills, surface savings opportunities, and guide customers toward the next best action.

videos.card_title: Resolve High-Bill Calls With IVR-Ready Energy Intelligence
videos.card_body: See how Bidgely-powered IVR support explains bill increases, detects unusual appliance behavior, and helps customers resolve issues without a generic escalation path.

videos.card_title: Guide Income-Qualified Customers to the Right Programs
videos.card_body: See how personalized emails, eligibility checks, and a guided web journey help customers find assistance programs they are more likely to qualify for and act on.

default.section_intro: Behind-the-meter visibility for DER, EV, and electrification planning so grid teams can act before constraints arrive.

videos.card_title: Ask Grid Planning Questions in Plain Language
videos.card_body: See how Energy Analyzer helps planners investigate peak demand, inefficient cooling, and EV charging behavior using natural-language analysis grounded in customer data.

videos.card_title: Model Long-Term Load Growth and Grid Stress Scenarios
videos.card_body: Use scenario analysis to see how electrification, DER adoption, and changing load behavior could compound over time across the grid.

videos.card_title: Use Grid Agents to Diagnose Constraints and Build the Next Best Plan
videos.card_body: See how grid agents explain what is driving a constrained substation, project future risk, and recommend targeted actions using appliance-level intelligence.
